title: minuartia gracilipes
intro: Minuartia gracilipes, also known as the small-flowered rock-cress or mountain rock-jasmine, is a flowering plant species in the family Caryophyllaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. It is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu, as well as being used to treat digestive issues and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Minuartia gracilipes include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
